description_long: A person with medium-length dark hair, wearing a bright red shirt and dark pants, is seated in a wooden chair at a rustic wooden table. The setting appears to be indoors, with visible wooden beams and a window with a grid pattern in the background. The person is positioned with their legs under the table, and their hands resting on the tabletop, possibly holding a cup or glass. The chair and table are both wooden, with the chair featuring a simple backrest and the table having a natural, unfinished look. The surrounding area includes some additional wooden furniture and decor, but the scene is fragmented and incomplete. There is no visible wheelchair frame, wheels, or mobility aid accessories present in the object.
description: A person in a red shirt sits at a rustic wooden table in a partially furnished indoor setting, with no visible wheelchair frame or accessories.
description_view_0: Front view showing the person seated at the table, with their face and upper body clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the person and chair, with the table and some background elements visible.
description_view_2: Side view with the person partially obscured by wooden beams and the table, mostly showing the background.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the person at the table from the side, with more of the table surface and chair visible.
attribute_wheel_configuration: no visible wheels or wheelchair frame
attribute_seating_posture: upright with hands resting on the table and legs under the table
